meaning: n.审计,稽核,查帐vt.稽核,旁听vi.查账
examples: Each year they audit our accounts and certify them as being true and fair.
The bank first learned of the problem when it carried out an internal audit.
One accounting firm, EY, uses an AI system that helps review contracts during an audit.
If you want to lower your audit profile by showing a profit, disqualify possible expenses.
It also said it had commissioned an independent audit by one of the "big four accounting firms".
